## Sandbox Protocol Checklist

Per NEXUS Sandbox Protocol (`00_governance_ref/support_records/NEXUS_SANDBOX_PROTOCOL_LOCK_RECORD_v1_1.md`):

- [ ] `python nexus_war_test.py` shows **PASS / 0 FAIL** (attach output below)
- [ ] No changes to governance doctrine (`00_governance_ref/doctrine/`) without noted Sovereign Operator approval
- [ ] No `.bak`, `*.backup`, `__pycache__`, or draft files included
- [ ] Reversibility classified (High / Medium / Low)

## Escalation Tier

<!-- Per ESCALATION_TIERING_PROTOCOL.md — choose one -->
- [ ] Tier 1 — Lab-internal refinement (no cross-lab impact)
- [ ] Tier 2 — Shared surface / cross-lab coordination (requires review)
- [ ] Tier 3 — Structural governance change (requires Sovereign Operator approval)

## Reversibility

- [ ] High — can undo without cascading impact
- [ ] Medium — localized refactor required
- [ ] Low — impacts routing, tool authorization, memory isolation, or doctrine
